content.intro: PropertyGoose integrates with The Deposit Scheme (TDS) to automate deposit protection. This guide walks you through connecting your TDS account.

steps.title: Go to Settings > Integrations
steps.content: Click 'Settings' in the sidebar, then select the 'Integrations' tab.

steps.title: Locate TDS Integration
steps.content: Find the TDS card in the integrations list. Click 'Connect' to begin setup.

steps.title: Enter your TDS credentials
steps.content: Enter your TDS Member ID and API key. You can find these in your TDS member portal under API access.

steps.title: Test connection
steps.content: Click 'Test Connection' to verify your credentials are correct.

steps.title: Save and activate
steps.content: Once the test passes, click 'Save' to enable the integration.

sections.title: TDS Membership Required
sections.content: You must have an active TDS membership to use this integration. Visit tds.gb.com to register if you don't have an account.

sections.title: Using the Integration
sections.content: Once connected, you can protect deposits directly from the tenancy detail page. Click 'Protect Deposit' and the information will be automatically sent to TDS. You'll receive confirmation and a protection certificate when complete.

sections.title: Automatic Prescribed Info
sections.content: When you protect a deposit through PropertyGoose, the system automatically generates the prescribed information letter required by law and sends it to the tenant.
